fingerprint: database schema connection setup|infrastructure
title: Database schema & connection setup
description: Drizzle ORM schema (users, customers, addresses, categories, brands, products, product_variants, orders, order_items, payments, promotions, banners, verification_tokens) and Neon Postgres connection. No lib/db exists yet — this is the foundation every other backend feature depends on.

factors: Every other backend feature reads/writes through this layer
Schema already documented in SPEC.md, well-understood Drizzle setup
Neon serverless connection pooling needs verification under load

urgency.reason: Blocks nearly every other feature in the queue

fingerprint: core authentication registration login session rbac rate limiting|authentication
title: Core authentication (registration, login, session, RBAC, rate limiting)
description: Custom JWT session auth via jose: email/password registration with validation, secure login with HTTP-only cookie sessions, role-based access control (customer/admin/super_admin), and rate limiting on auth endpoints.

factors: Gates every account-scoped and admin-scoped feature
JWT/jose session wiring, RBAC middleware, rate limiting all new
Session/security correctness is high-stakes if done wrong

urgency.reason: Blocks checkout, admin dashboard, and account features

fingerprint: email verification otp for new accounts|authentication
title: Email verification (OTP) for new accounts
description: New accounts start unverified; system sends an OTP via Mailgun that the customer must confirm before full access.

factors: Confirms real email ownership, stated requirement
OTP generation/expiry + Mailgun send, moderate scope
Well-understood OTP pattern

urgency.reason: Not on the checkout-conversion critical path

fingerprint: forgot password reset flow otp|authentication
title: Forgot password / reset flow (OTP)
description: Customer requests a password reset, receives an OTP via Mailgun, and sets a new password after OTP verification.

factors: Required account-recovery path, stated requirement
OTP generation/expiry + Mailgun send + password reset, moderate scope
Well-understood OTP pattern

urgency.reason: Not on the checkout-conversion critical path

fingerprint: product crud images status availability featured|product management
title: Product CRUD (images, status, availability, featured)
description: Admin product create/update/delete with image upload to Vercel Blob, active/inactive status, availability flag (no stock quantity), and featured-product selection.

factors: Core catalog data everything else (cart, checkout, orders, search) reads from
Vercel Blob upload integration plus full CRUD wiring to existing admin UI
Well-understood CRUD pattern

urgency.reason: Blocks variants, search, checkout, orders, dashboard

fingerprint: product variants size color with individual pricing|product management
title: Product variants (size, color) with individual pricing
description: Products support variants such as size and color, each with its own price.

factors: Needed for products that come in sizes/colors
Variant table + pricing per variant, moderate admin UI wiring
Well-understood pattern

urgency.reason: Extends product CRUD, not independently blocking

fingerprint: category management hierarchical|product management
title: Category management (hierarchical)
description: Admin CRUD for product categories with hierarchical structure.

factors: Needed for storefront navigation and filtering
Hierarchical CRUD, moderate complexity
Well-understood pattern

urgency.reason: Feeds search/filtering but not itself on the conversion path

fingerprint: brand management|product management
title: Brand management
description: Admin CRUD for product brands.

factors: Needed for product filtering by brand
Flat CRUD, no hierarchy
Trivial, well-understood pattern

urgency.reason: Feeds search/filtering but not itself on the conversion path

fingerprint: product search filtering|product management
title: Product search & filtering
description: Storefront product search with filters for category, brand, and price range.

factors: Core product-discovery path for customers
Search UI already exists (components/search/), needs backend query wiring
Well-understood query pattern

urgency.reason: Important but not blocking other backend work

fingerprint: serverside shopping cart persistence addremoveupdate realtime totals|shopping cart
title: Server-side shopping cart (persistence, add/remove/update, real-time totals)
description: Cart persisted to the database for logged-in users, add/remove/update items with quantity validation, real-time total calculation, synced with the existing Zustand client store.

factors: Required before checkout can read a real cart
DB-backed cart plus API routes, moderate scope
Zustand client state must stay in sync with server cart (flagged risk in technical-notes.md)

urgency.reason: Directly blocks checkout

fingerprint: multistep checkout flow guest checkout autoregistration confirmation|checkout
title: Multi-step checkout flow (guest checkout, auto-registration, confirmation)
description: Contact → Shipping → Payment → Confirm checkout with Indonesia-specific address fields, guest checkout without prior registration, auto-registration of a customer account on order completion, order summary review, and confirmation page.

factors: The core conversion path for the whole store
Multi-step form, Indonesia address validation, and auto-registration logic all new
Auto-registration can create duplicate accounts if guest email already exists (flagged risk in technical-notes.md)

urgency.reason: Blocks payment and order creation

fingerprint: midtrans payment integration snap va ewallets qris webhook idempotency|payment
title: Midtrans payment integration (Snap, VA, e-wallets, QRIS, webhook, idempotency)
description: Midtrans Snap checkout supporting cards, bank transfer (VA), e-wallets (GoPay/OVO/ShopeePay), and QRIS, behind a PaymentProvider interface; signature-verified webhook handler; payment status tracking; idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges.

factors: Revenue-critical, required by client for Indonesian market
External gateway integration, multiple payment methods, webhook signature verification
Midtrans sandbox may not match production behavior exactly (flagged risk in technical-notes.md)
Payment correctness failures are high-stakes

urgency.reason: No revenue can be collected without it

fingerprint: order creation from cart atomic transaction|order management
title: Order creation from cart (atomic transaction)
description: Order + orderItems + payment record created atomically in a single DB transaction on checkout completion, with an idempotency key to prevent duplicate orders from double form-submits.

factors: Central write path that order management, customer accounts, dashboard, and email all depend on
Transactional pattern is well-documented in technical-notes.md
Well-understood DB transaction pattern

urgency.reason: Blocks order management, customer accounts, dashboard, and email

fingerprint: admin order list detail view|order management
title: Admin order list & detail view
description: Admin order list with filtering (status, date range, search) and order detail view with customer info, items, and payment.

factors: Required for admin to fulfill any order
Admin UI already exists (app/admin/orders/), needs route handlers + TanStack Query wiring
Well-understood CRUD/list pattern

urgency.reason: Depends on orders existing first

title: Order status updates & audit trail

fingerprint: transactional email notifications mailgun|email notifications
title: Transactional email notifications (Mailgun)
